title: pleurospermum erosa
intro: Pleurospermum erosa is a type of plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pleurospermum erosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
